'''kachotho''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:osazone|osazone]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| k-ch-th
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:osazone|osazone]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| kachotho
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:kæchetheth|kæchetheth]] || [[word:kæchethej|kæchethej]] || [[word:kæchethesh|kæchethesh]] || [[word:kæchethe|kæchethe]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:kachochothoth|kachochothoth]] || [[word:kachochothoj|kachochothoj]] || [[word:kachochothosh|kachochothosh]] || [[word:kachochotho|kachochotho]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:kachothoth|kachothoth]] || [[word:kachothoj|kachothoj]] || [[word:kachothosh|kachothosh]] || [[word:kachotho|kachotho]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:kachofthoth|kachofthoth]] || [[word:kachofthoj|kachofthoj]] || [[word:kachofthosh|kachofthosh]] || [[word:kachofthof|kachofthof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:kachothotho|kachothotho]] || [[word:kachothojo|kachothojo]] || [[word:kachothosho|kachothosho]] || [[word:kachothoko|kachothoko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:kachothoth|kachothoth]] || [[word:kachothoj|kachothoj]] || [[word:kachothosh|kachothosh]] || [[word:kachotho|kachotho]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:kachothothol|kachothothol]] || [[word:kachothojol|kachothojol]] || [[word:kachothoshol|kachothoshol]] || [[word:kachothokol|kachothokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:kachothothotho|kachothothotho]] || [[word:kachothojojo|kachothojojo]] || [[word:kachothoshosho|kachothoshosho]] || [[word:kachothoko|kachothoko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:kachothothon|kachothothon]] || [[word:kachothojon|kachothojon]] || [[word:kachothoshon|kachothoshon]] || [[word:kachothokon|kachothokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:kachothothoro|kachothothoro]] || [[word:kachothojoro|kachothojoro]] || [[word:kachothoshoro|kachothoshoro]] || [[word:kachothokoro|kachothokoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki female nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|5390c6a}}
